name: Headphone Amplifier Portable Compact RCA 6.35mm 3.5mm Input for Microphones
description: Description: 3 Channel Input Jacks: Stereo headphone amplifier supports RCA, 6.35mm and 3.5mm input jacks, compatible with most input devices on the market. 8 Channel Output Sockets: The headphone amplifier supports the simultaneous output of 8 headphones, each output has a 6.35mm and 3.5mm universal sockets, and each output socket is designed with a gain circuit to provide excellent sound quality. Wide Compatibility: The headphone amplifier supports independently switching of 3 input devices or simultaneous playback. It is suitable for the gain output of devices with low sound signals, such as smartphones, computers, microphones, power amplifier, active speakers, headphones, music players and other devices. Heavy Duty Construction: The headphone amplifier adopts a full metal shell and coating process to reduce electromagnetic interference and provide a purer stereo sound, high strength, wear resistance and scratch resistance. Easy to Use: The headphone amplifier supports 4 channel independently volume control output, easy to use. The size of the headphone amplifier is about 14cmx9.6cmx3cm/5.51inchx3.78inchx1.18inch, which is lightweight and portable.
